plugin_desc: Geist and Vertiv PDU, environmental monitor and remote power SNMP baseline child template for devices under Geist PEN 21239. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current MIB facts confirm internal, temperature sensor, airflow, relay, RPM, analog, outlet, device-availability and remote-power tables, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, fan or power-health scalar semantics, so private health and PDU business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
